The '''Battle of [[Thovinack]]''' was a conflict during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was defeated by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces on [[Thovinack]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> During this battle, Rebel agent [[Tisha Rostek]] was killed.<ref name="AJ11" />
